extensionDescription.message: A pixel pet that evolves based on your browsing habits.

supportRewardsSubtitle.message: Support development and unlock all pet skins!

donationMethod.message: Method: Support via Buy Me a Coffee

donationInstruction.message: Include your email/contact in house message to receive your code.

onboardingDesc.message: Dark-gotchi reflects your browsing habits. Try adding productive (White) and distracting (Black) sites in the How it works? section below!

howToUseDesc.message:
• Tracking: Time is measured every minute based on the currently active (focused) tab's domain.
• Black/White Lists: You can input full URLs (e.g., https://youtube.com/watch) and it will automatically extract the domain to match all sub-paths.
• Auto Rendering: If enabled (showing 'Disable' button), the pet will appear at the bottom right of all pages.

permissionDesc.message: Show your pet everywhere you go
